description: Style NotePair of shoes with a fun twist, this piece from catwalk is for those who are tired of the standard foot staples. Pair these with a short pleated skirt for an emo-style vibe or with rolled up denims (we recommend colour pop ones!) and a tonal tee.Product Detailsblack shoes with fabric upper, central lace-ups, synthetic overlays, is open at the heel counter and is elasticated on the heel collarSmooth footbed with branding embossed on the heelTextured rubber outsole with a wedge heelMaterial and CareRubber and syntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlightSizeHeel: 3"
